scenario: All ambiguities resolved in vision spec
expected_behavior: Skip conflict identification; proceed directly to scope boundary definition with clear IN/OUT/Deferred lists
notes: Fast path: no conflicts found, user confirms scope immediately

contradictions: must support push notifications AND no external dependencies

expected_behavior: Identify all 3 conflicts, propose resolutions one-by-one, map full decision tree for each, then present scope boundary
notes: Blocked path: each conflict requires explicit user decision before scope approval

scenario: Scope creep risk: implied complexity hidden in simple requirement

input.flagged_risk: implies currency conversion, tax handling, compliance per country

expected_behavior: Surface the hidden scope (compliance + currency + taxes), propose scoped-down alternative (single-currency MVP), get user choice
notes: Scope boundary must explicitly LIST what is IN vs OUT (e.g., 'currency conversion OUT, single-currency IN')
